subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Kuntu Kanzan Makhfiyyan (Commentary on the Hadith of the Hidden Treasure)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath stirred up the celestial spheres of being through the movement of divine attraction, and hath caused the oceans of existence to surge [3.5s]... ...And to continue: To him who looks at these lines and understands these indications, it is well known with respect to the request of that traveller… O Lord so rich in bounty, so replete with grace
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی قد حرک افلاک الذوات بحرکه جذب صمدانیه و قد موج ابحر الکینونات
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge of attributes same as knowledge of God, @names and attributes of God, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @eternal archetypes [a'yan-i-thabitah], @essential vs. actional attributes of God, @mystical themes
